PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "manage.py","runserver","127.0.0.1:8000" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\User\\chatbot2\\Backend" -RedirectStandardOutput "C:\\Users\\User\\chatbot2\\django_out.log" -RedirectStandardError "C:\\Users\\User\\chatbot2\\django_err.log" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; $proc.Id; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; if \($proc.HasExited\) { "EXITED with code $\($proc.ExitCode\)" } else { "RUNNING" })
PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; cd C:\\Users\\User\\chatbot2\\Backend; python -c "import django; django.setup\(\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; $env:DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE="config.settings"; cd C:\\Users\\User\\chatbot2\\Backend; python manage.py check 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 50)

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; cd C:\\Users\\User\\chatbot2\\Backend; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "manage.py","runserver","127.0.0.1:8000","--noreload" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\User\\chatbot2\\Backend" -RedirectStandardOutput "C:\\Users\\User\\chatbot2\\dj_out.log" -RedirectStandardError "C:\\Users\\User\\chatbot2\\dj_err.log" -PassThru | Select-Object Id; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6)

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; cd C:\\Users\\User\\chatbot2\\Backend; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "C:\\Users\\User\\chatbot2\\Backend"; python manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:8000 --noreload 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; Receive-Job $job; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job -Force)

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c","python manage.py runserver 127.0.0.1:8000 --noreload > C:\\Users\\User\\chatbot2\\dj.log 2>&1" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\User\\chatbot2\\Backend" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; $proc.Id; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; \(Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 8000 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue\).TcpTestSucceeded)
